text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto's first three years finish as an
undeniable success. She has accomplished a host
of wonderful achievements.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yet, she remains haunted by a lingering whisper
among racing fans...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"She could have been more radiant if only T.M.
Opera O hadn't been around. It would've been
better if they had run in separate generations."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, a huge opportunity comes knocking at
our door.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I bring you a proposal! I've been thinking
of ways to keep Meisho Doto active.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
An expedition, to travel beyond! Have you ever
considered having her compete internationally?
choice_data_list: Compete in an international G1 race?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. Some have expressed their dissatisfaction
seeing Meisho Doto and T.M. Opera O pitted
against each other.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
They are both stars, main actors in their own
right! So it could be wise for them to walk
different paths. What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unable to gather my thoughts, I bring the
suggestion to Meisho Doto.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: An international debut? I must say, though I enjoy vying for the spotlight, I do regret that we cannot share it.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The director has proposed a great idea. As a
member of my era, Doto is well deserving of more
attention.
choice_data_list: What do you think, Meisho Doto?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Normally, I'd expect Meisho Doto to fly into a
panic, but unusually, this time, she's quiet. But
then...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: An era...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: My era... and Opera O's era...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
If we split apart, we would double our benefits.
The two of us would be happier than ever...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Is that... what you're trying to say?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I... don't want that.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: What?! Is this a refusal, Doto?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto speaks with a firm tone rarely heard
from her.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
You're saying, without me, Opera O would have
achieved much more.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
And so would I if it weren't for competing with
Opera O.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: But, I don't think that's true. I'm only this strong because Opera O was around.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Who you are now, Opera O... has something to
do with me. I just know it!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
We're no longer who we were in the past. I
changed from being a burden to a rival. Going
our separate ways... isn't going to double
anything.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
If we're apart, I won't be me anymore. Neither will
you be you, Opera O.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to move forward being grateful you are
here, not imagining if you weren't!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: So...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Are you... really okay with this, Trainer?
choice_data_list: Of course. You're completely right, after all.
Of course. You're completely right, after all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some things are hard to understand just by
looking from the outside, but I'm fully convinced
after hearing what she said.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of them have something special that
can't be split apart. It's unbreakable. Without it,
she couldn't have shown her radiance these past
three years.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: This is their race, and it must go on!

text_block_list.name: Doto and Opera O
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaah!Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thump, thump, thump, thump!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... I won't... I won't lose next time, Opera O!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Come hither, Doto! Our bond is eternal, my dear
rival. You are bound to me by fate!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, yet again, their fans stir with excitement
at the sight of another close battle. That's right...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: This era belongs to Meisho Doto and T.M. Opera O. Indispensable to each other, they burn bright as two stars in racing history.
